accessibilityTree:
- banner:
  - button "Back to map"
  - heading "Customise Route" [level=1]
  - paragraph: Fine-tune your walking adventure
  - button "Help"
- main:
  - heading "Distance" [level=2]
  - text: 3.2 km
  - slider "Target walk length"
  - heading "Duration" [level=2]
  - text: 75 minutes
  - slider "Time on foot"
  - heading "Crowd Level" [level=2]
  - radiogroup "Crowd Level":
    - radio "Quiet Tranquil streets":
      - paragraph: Quiet
      - paragraph: Tranquil streets
    - radio "Balanced Local buzz" [checked]:
      - paragraph: Balanced
      - paragraph: Local buzz
    - radio "Lively Popular spots":
      - paragraph: Lively
      - paragraph: Popular spots
  - heading "Elevation Preference" [level=2]
  - radiogroup "Elevation Preference":
    - radio "Flat Minimal climbs" [checked]:
      - paragraph: Flat
      - paragraph: Minimal climbs
    - radio "Rolling Gentle hills":
      - paragraph: Rolling
      - paragraph: Gentle hills
    - radio "Steep Challenge me":
      - paragraph: Steep
      - paragraph: Challenge me
  - heading "Surface Type" [level=2]
  - radiogroup "Surface type":
    - radio "Paved" [checked]
    - radio "Trail"
    - radio "Boardwalk"
    - radio "Mixed"
  - heading "Interest Mix" [level=2]
  - text: Nature 40%
  - slider "Nature allocation"
  - text: History 30%
  - slider "History allocation"
  - text: Food & Drink 30%
  - slider "Food & Drink allocation"
  - heading "Route Preview" [level=2]
  - button "Harbour Lights Promenade 3.6 km • 65 minutes" [pressed]:
    - paragraph: Harbour Lights Promenade
    - paragraph: 3.6 km • 65 minutes
  - button "Coffee Culture Circuit 2.4 km • 45 minutes":
    - paragraph: Coffee Culture Circuit
    - paragraph: 2.4 km • 45 minutes
  - button "Hidden Garden Lanes 3.0 km • 55 minutes":
    - paragraph: Hidden Garden Lanes
    - paragraph: 3.0 km • 55 minutes
  - button "Regenerate"
  - button "Start Route"
  - heading "Advanced Options" [level=2]
  - article:
    - paragraph: Safety Priority
    - paragraph: Well-lit, busy routes
    - switch "Safety Priority"
  - article:
    - paragraph: Accessibility
    - paragraph: Step-free routes
    - switch "Accessibility" [checked]
  - article:
    - paragraph: Offline download
    - paragraph: Preload maps and audio
    - switch "Offline download"
- navigation "Primary navigation":
  - button "Map Map":
    - img "Map"
    - text: Map
  - button "Discover Discover":
    - img "Discover"
    - text: Discover
  - button "Routes Routes":
    - img "Routes"
    - text: Routes
  - button "Profile Profile":
    - img "Profile"
    - text: Profile
- button "Controls"
